items.name_en: Inspired by the 1970s, Bottega Veneta Women's Logo Shoulder Bag, smooth leather offers a clean and sharp look, like the efficiency and resilience of a career woman, premium hardware pendant on the front, overall retro and elegant, excellent leather feel is soft, this Bottega Veneta series is truly beautiful, downplaying the complexity of styling, not competing, just interpreting itself with the best quality

items.name_en: Inspired by the 1970s, Bottega Veneta Women's Logo Shoulder Bag. Smooth leather offers a clean, sharp look, embodying the efficiency and resilience of a career woman. Premium metal pendant on the front, overall retro and elegant. Excellent leather with a soft touch. This Bottega Veneta series is truly beautiful for everyone, downplaying complex styling and not competing for attention, simply interpreting itself with the best quality.

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta BVII New Color-Block Gemelli Bag. The Gemelli twin-bag silhouette is deeply loved, and now a color-block version has been released. New woven bag~ unique and high-end. The artistic weaving style showcases the charm of simplicity and luxury. Every style reveals a generous temperament. I'm falling more in love with the Bottega Veneta vibe!

items.name_en: Bottega Veneta collector-grade mini-weave is truly the best!! Bottega Veneta's most classic mini woven handbag is back!! We used the highest quality leather paired with top-tier craftsmanship ❤️ to create the most precious works. We pioneered the Intrecciato leather weaving technique ❤️. This unique traditional exclusive leather weaving method has not only become our signature but also embodies the time-consuming craftsmanship of our products ❤️. The brand new TOSCA handbag is definitely a selected piece worth collecting 🆕

items.name_en: Top 2023 Spring/Summer new arrivals continue the brand's woven style with metal rope knot closures. This time, the shoulder strap is also made of tube weaving, presenting different craftsmanship. Versatile carrying styles to create more different looks. Intrecciato woven leather small handbag, comes with a sliding crossbody strap. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
items.name_cn:
Top 2023 Spring/Summer new arrivals continue the brand's woven style with metal rope knot closures. This time, the shoulder strap is also made of tube weaving, presenting different craftsmanship. Versatile carrying styles to create more different looks. Intrecciato woven leather small handbag, comes with a sliding crossbody strap. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
Size: 20*25*10.5cm, Model: 7463

specs.rawTitle:
Top 2023 Spring/Summer new arrivals continue the brand's woven style with metal rope knot closures. This time, the shoulder strap is also made of tube weaving, presenting different craftsmanship. Equipped with a compartment, including 1 zip pocket and 2 open pockets. Magnetic snap closure.
Size: 20*25*10.5cm, Model: 7463

items.name_en: New
items.name_cn:
New
Bottega Veneta Small Woven Cloud Bag ☁ 2021's hottest🔥 The Pouch hand-woven lamb skin. The first series designed after Daniel Lee took over Celine. The silhouette is incredibly flattering~ stylish and chic~ elegant and minimalist, lazy yet intellectual. Style No.: 9918B💙💙Wide weave size:22*12*7⚠️
